nodes.name: 婆罗洲
nodes.summary: 婆罗洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联91种鸟类，包括菲律宾冢雉、Bornean crestless fireback、红头林鹧鸪等91种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普
nodes.summary: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联33种鸟类，包括白眉田雞、Bates's nightjar、Bates's swift等33种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Mongolian Ornithological Society
nodes.summary: Mongolian Ornithological Society是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白額隼，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 白額隼
nodes.summary: 白額隼（White-fronted falconet，学名 Microhierax latifrons），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐、栖息地破坏、小种群风险。

nodes.name: 小种群风险
nodes.summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 加里曼丹
nodes.summary: 加里曼丹是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Moustached hawk-cuckoo、蘇门答腊角鸮、Scarlet-rumped trogon等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Mangrove forest
nodes.summary: Mangrove forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联16种鸟类，包括小蓝鹭、绿喉芒果蜂鸟、Little wood rail等16种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Described by the British ornithologist Richard Bowdler Sharpe in 1879, it is endemic to Borneo, where it is found in Sarawak, Sabah, and extreme northeastern Kalimantan

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species inhabits open forests, forest edges, clearings with dead trees, and cultivated regions with interspersed trees, and rarely in mangrove forests

links.evidence: fringillarius in Kalimantan, Indonesia|url=https://www.researchgate.net/publication/236856304|journal=Forktail|volume=28|pages=162–163}} It inhabits open forests, forest edges, clearings with dead trees, and cultivated regions with interspersed trees, and is thought to be especially common on mountainous slopes. It is also infrequently found in mangrove forests. The species is found at elevations of

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Threats to the species include deforestation, forest fires, and the cage-bird trade

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The white-fronted falconet is classified as being near threatened by the International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN) on the IUCN Red List, due to its small range, a moderately small population that is declining, and habitat loss within its range. It is also listed on Appendix II of CITES. The species' total population is estimated to be 15,000–30,000 total individuals, out of which 10,000–19,999 are adults

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The white-fronted falconet is classified as being near threatened by the International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN) on the IUCN Red List, due to its small range, a moderately small population that is declining, and habitat loss within its range. It is also listed on Appendix II of CITES. The species' total population is estimated to be 15,000–30,000 total individuals, out of which 10,000–19,999 are adults
